works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 1 tossups and 3 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist created a portrait of the creator of the Abraham Lincoln statue in the Capitol Rotunda, Vinnie Ream, playing a harp.
examples: This artist created a portrait of the creator of the Abraham Lincoln statue in the Capitol Rotunda, Vinnie Ream, playing a harp.

clues.clue: A family pleads with a group of "redleg" troops who plan to burn their house in a painting this man created to attack General Thomas Ewing, who forcibly depopulated part of this man's home state with his Order No. 11.
examples: A family pleads with a group of "redleg" troops who plan to burn their house in a painting this man created to attack General Thomas Ewing, who forcibly depopulated part of this man's home state with his Order No. 11.

clues.clue: A jovial man wears three hats while another man reads off of a piece of paper in the third painting in a series by this man that also includes Stump Speaking and The County Election.
examples: A jovial man wears three hats while another man reads off of a piece of paper in the third painting in a series by this man that also includes Stump Speaking and The County Election.

clues.clue: In his most famous painting, the viewer is stared at by a man wearing a Phrygian cap, a half-Native American boy leaning on a pile of pelts, and a rather feline- looking bear on a leash.
examples: In his most famous painting, the viewer is stared at by a man wearing a Phrygian cap, a half-Native American boy leaning on a pile of pelts, and a rather feline- looking bear on a leash.
